api.auth.authenticate_request.name: authenticate_request
api.auth.authenticate_request.description: Validates the incoming JWT token from the Authorization header. Calls `@core.cache.get` to check the token blacklist, then verifies the signature and expiry. Raises `AuthError` on failure.

api.auth.get_current_user.name: get_current_user
api.auth.get_current_user.description: Decodes the JWT payload and loads the full user record. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` with the user id extracted from the token. Returns a `UserContext` object used downstream by all handlers.

api.auth.issue_token.name: issue_token
api.auth.issue_token.description: Issues a signed JWT for an authenticated user. Accepts a user id and scopes list, sets expiry to 24 hours, signs with the application secret. Calls `@core.cache.set` to register the token for blacklist tracking.

api.auth.revoke_token.name: revoke_token
api.auth.revoke_token.description: Adds the given token's jti claim to the blacklist. Calls `@core.cache.set` with a TTL matching the token's remaining lifetime so the cache entry expires automatically.

api.auth.require_scope.name: require_scope
api.auth.require_scope.description: Decorator factory that wraps a route handler and checks that the current user's token includes the required scope string. Calls `@api.auth.get_current_user` internally.

api.auth.refresh_token.name: refresh_token
api.auth.refresh_token.description: Accepts a valid (non-expired) refresh token, validates it via `@core.cache.get`, issues a new access token via `@api.auth.issue_token`, and revokes the old one via `@api.auth.revoke_token`.

api.products.list_products.name: list_products
api.products.list_products.description: HTTP GET handler for `/products`. Parses query parameters (page, page_size, category, sort). Calls `@catalog.search.search_products` and returns a paginated JSON response.

api.products.get_product.name: get_product
api.products.get_product.description: HTTP GET handler for `/products/{id}`. Calls `@catalog.products.get_product_by_id` and `@catalog.pricing.get_effective_price`. Returns combined product detail with current price.

api.products.create_product.name: create_product
api.products.create_product.description: HTTP POST handler for `/products`. Validates the request body against the product schema. Calls `@catalog.products.create_product` and `@catalog.inventory.set_stock_level`. Requires `catalog:write` scope via `@api.auth.require_scope`.

api.products.update_product.name: update_product
api.products.update_product.description: HTTP PATCH handler for `/products/{id}`. Applies partial updates by calling `@catalog.products.update_product`. Requires `catalog:write` scope.

api.products.delete_product.name: delete_product
api.products.delete_product.description: HTTP DELETE handler for `/products/{id}`. Calls `@catalog.products.delete_product` and `@catalog.inventory.remove_product`. Requires `catalog:admin` scope via `@api.auth.require_scope`.

api.products.get_stock.name: get_stock
api.products.get_stock.description: HTTP GET handler for `/products/{id}/stock`. Calls `@catalog.inventory.get_stock_level` and returns available quantity and reservation status.

api.products.update_stock.name: update_stock
api.products.update_stock.description: HTTP PATCH handler for `/products/{id}/stock`. Calls `@catalog.inventory.set_stock_level`. Requires `catalog:write` scope via `@api.auth.require_scope`.

api.orders.get_cart.name: get_cart
api.orders.get_cart.description: HTTP GET handler for `/cart`. Retrieves the current user's cart via `@orders.cart.get_cart`. Calls `@api.auth.get_current_user` to identify the user.

api.orders.add_to_cart.name: add_to_cart
api.orders.add_to_cart.description: HTTP POST handler for `/cart/items`. Validates the item payload and calls `@orders.cart.add_item`. Calls `@catalog.inventory.reserve_stock` to place a soft reservation.

api.orders.remove_from_cart.name: remove_from_cart
api.orders.remove_from_cart.description: HTTP DELETE handler for `/cart/items/{item_id}`. Calls `@orders.cart.remove_item` and `@catalog.inventory.release_reservation`.

api.orders.checkout.name: checkout
api.orders.checkout.description: HTTP POST handler for `/orders`. Calls `@orders.checkout.initiate_checkout` and `@payments.gateway.charge`. Returns the created order id on success.

api.orders.get_order.name: get_order
api.orders.get_order.description: HTTP GET handler for `/orders/{id}`. Calls `@orders.order_mgmt.get_order` and checks ownership via `@api.auth.get_current_user`.

api.orders.list_orders.name: list_orders
api.orders.list_orders.description: HTTP GET handler for `/orders`. Calls `@orders.order_mgmt.list_orders_for_user` with the user id from `@api.auth.get_current_user`. Supports pagination.

api.orders.cancel_order.name: cancel_order
api.orders.cancel_order.description: HTTP POST handler for `/orders/{id}/cancel`. Calls `@orders.order_mgmt.cancel_order` and `@payments.refunds.issue_refund` if a charge was already captured.

api.payments.get_invoice.name: get_invoice
api.payments.get_invoice.description: HTTP GET handler for `/invoices/{id}`. Calls `@payments.invoicing.get_invoice` and checks ownership via `@api.auth.get_current_user`.

api.payments.list_invoices.name: list_invoices
api.payments.list_invoices.description: HTTP GET handler for `/invoices`. Returns all invoices for the current user. Calls `@payments.invoicing.list_invoices_for_user` and `@api.auth.get_current_user`.

api.payments.download_invoice_pdf.name: download_invoice_pdf
api.payments.download_invoice_pdf.description: HTTP GET handler for `/invoices/{id}/pdf`. Calls `@payments.invoicing.render_invoice_pdf` and streams the result as a binary response.

api.payments.request_refund.name: request_refund
api.payments.request_refund.description: HTTP POST handler for `/orders/{id}/refund`. Validates the refund request, then calls `@payments.refunds.issue_refund`. Requires `payments:refund` scope via `@api.auth.require_scope`.

api.payments.get_payment_status.name: get_payment_status
api.payments.get_payment_status.description: HTTP GET handler for `/orders/{id}/payment`. Calls `@payments.gateway.get_charge_status` and returns a normalised status string.

catalog.products.get_product_by_id.name: get_product_by_id
catalog.products.get_product_by_id.description: Loads a single product record from persistent storage. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` with the products table. Returns `None` if not found.

catalog.products.list_products.name: list_products
catalog.products.list_products.description: Returns a slice of products matching optional filter criteria. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` with constructed WHERE clauses for category, status, and price range.

catalog.products.create_product.name: create_product
catalog.products.create_product.description: Inserts a new product row. Validates uniqueness of the SKU by calling `@core.db.fetch_one` before insert. Calls `@core.db.execute` and `@core.events.publish` with a `product.created` event.

catalog.products.update_product.name: update_product
catalog.products.update_product.description: Applies a partial update to an existing product. Calls `@core.db.execute` with an UPDATE statement. Publishes a `product.updated` event via `@core.events.publish`.

catalog.products.delete_product.name: delete_product
catalog.products.delete_product.description: Soft-deletes a product by setting `deleted_at`. Calls `@core.db.execute` and publishes `product.deleted` via `@core.events.publish`.

catalog.products.get_products_by_ids.name: get_products_by_ids
catalog.products.get_products_by_ids.description: Bulk-loads a list of products by id list. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` with an IN clause. Used by search and recommendation paths.

catalog.products.rebuild_product_index.name: rebuild_product_index
catalog.products.rebuild_product_index.description: Re-indexes all active products into the search cache. Iterates via `@core.db.fetch_many` and calls `@core.cache.set` for each product document.

catalog.search.search_products.name: search_products
catalog.search.search_products.description: Full-text search over the product catalog. Checks `@core.cache.get` for a cached result keyed by query hash. On miss, calls `@catalog.products.list_products` with keyword filters and stores the result via `@core.cache.set`.

catalog.search.suggest_products.name: suggest_products
catalog.search.suggest_products.description: Returns autocomplete suggestions for a partial query string. Calls `@core.cache.get` keyed on the prefix. Falls back to `@catalog.products.list_products` with a prefix filter.

catalog.search.get_similar_products.name: get_similar_products
catalog.search.get_similar_products.description: Returns products similar to a given product id. Calls `@catalog.products.get_product_by_id` to load the source product, then `@catalog.products.list_products` filtered by matching category and tags.

catalog.search.trending_products.name: trending_products
catalog.search.trending_products.description: Returns the current trending product list. Reads a pre-computed list from `@core.cache.get`. The list is refreshed by a background job outside this module.

catalog.search.full_text_search.name: full_text_search
catalog.search.full_text_search.description: Low-level full-text search implementation. Tokenises the query and scores products. Also reads cart affinity data from `@orders.cart.get_active_carts` to boost frequently carted items.

catalog.search.invalidate_search_cache.name: invalidate_search_cache
catalog.search.invalidate_search_cache.description: Clears all search-related cache keys when product data changes. Calls `@core.cache.delete_pattern`.

catalog.pricing.get_effective_price.name: get_effective_price
catalog.pricing.get_effective_price.description: Returns the effective sale price for a product, applying any active promotions. Calls `@catalog.pricing.get_promotions` and `@catalog.inventory.get_stock_level` (to apply low-stock surcharge rules).

catalog.pricing.get_promotions.name: get_promotions
catalog.pricing.get_promotions.description: Loads active promotions from `@core.db.fetch_many`. Filters to those overlapping the current timestamp.

catalog.pricing.apply_discount_code.name: apply_discount_code
catalog.pricing.apply_discount_code.description: Validates and applies a discount code to a price. Looks up the code via `@core.db.fetch_one` and checks usage limits.

catalog.pricing.calculate_cart_total.name: calculate_cart_total
catalog.pricing.calculate_cart_total.description: Computes the total for a list of cart line items. Calls `@catalog.pricing.get_effective_price` for each item and sums results including tax.

catalog.pricing.get_tax_rate.name: get_tax_rate
catalog.pricing.get_tax_rate.description: Returns the applicable tax rate for a given country code. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` against the tax_rates table. Results are cached via `@core.cache.get` and `@core.cache.set`.

catalog.pricing.set_base_price.name: set_base_price
catalog.pricing.set_base_price.description: Updates the base price for a product. Calls `@core.db.execute` and invalidates the pricing cache for that product via `@core.cache.delete_pattern`.

catalog.inventory.get_stock_level.name: get_stock_level
catalog.inventory.get_stock_level.description: Returns the current on-hand quantity and reservation count for a product. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` against the inventory table.

catalog.inventory.set_stock_level.name: set_stock_level
catalog.inventory.set_stock_level.description: Sets the absolute on-hand stock for a product. Calls `@core.db.execute`. Publishes a `stock.updated` event via `@core.events.publish`.

catalog.inventory.reserve_stock.name: reserve_stock
catalog.inventory.reserve_stock.description: Places a soft reservation on a given quantity for a product. Calls `@core.db.execute` to increment the reservation counter. Raises `InsufficientStockError` if not enough available.

catalog.inventory.release_reservation.name: release_reservation
catalog.inventory.release_reservation.description: Decrements the reservation counter for a product. Called when a cart item is removed or a checkout fails. Calls `@core.db.execute`.

catalog.inventory.commit_reservation.name: commit_reservation
catalog.inventory.commit_reservation.description: Converts a soft reservation to a confirmed deduction on checkout. Calls `@core.db.execute` in a transaction. Publishes `stock.committed` via `@core.events.publish`.

catalog.inventory.remove_product.name: remove_product
catalog.inventory.remove_product.description: Removes the inventory record for a deleted product. Calls `@core.db.execute` to delete the inventory row.

catalog.inventory.low_stock_products.name: low_stock_products
catalog.inventory.low_stock_products.description: Returns products whose on-hand quantity is below their reorder threshold. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` with a WHERE clause comparing quantity to threshold.

orders.cart.get_cart.name: get_cart
orders.cart.get_cart.description: Loads the active cart for a user. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` for the cart header and `@core.db.fetch_many` for line items. Returns an assembled `Cart` object.

orders.cart.get_active_carts.name: get_active_carts
orders.cart.get_active_carts.description: Returns all carts that have been modified in the last 24 hours. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` filtered by `updated_at`. Used for analytics and affinity scoring.

orders.cart.add_item.name: add_item
orders.cart.add_item.description: Adds a product to the user's cart or increments quantity if already present. Calls `@core.db.execute` for upsert logic. Calls `@catalog.pricing.get_effective_price` to snapshot the price at add time.

orders.cart.remove_item.name: remove_item
orders.cart.remove_item.description: Removes a line item from the cart. Calls `@core.db.execute` to delete the cart_item row.

orders.cart.update_item_quantity.name: update_item_quantity
orders.cart.update_item_quantity.description: Updates the quantity of a cart line item. Calls `@core.db.execute` and re-snapshots the price via `@catalog.pricing.get_effective_price`.

orders.cart.apply_discount_code.name: apply_discount_code
orders.cart.apply_discount_code.description: Applies a discount code to the cart. Calls `@catalog.pricing.apply_discount_code` to validate, then stores the code on the cart header via `@core.db.execute`.

orders.cart.clear_cart.name: clear_cart
orders.cart.clear_cart.description: Deletes all line items and resets the cart header. Calls `@core.db.execute`. Called after a successful checkout.

orders.cart.get_cart_total.name: get_cart_total
orders.cart.get_cart_total.description: Calculates and returns the cart total. Calls `@catalog.pricing.calculate_cart_total` with the cart's line items.

orders.checkout.initiate_checkout.name: initiate_checkout
orders.checkout.initiate_checkout.description: Orchestrates the checkout flow. Calls `@orders.cart.get_cart`, `@catalog.inventory.commit_reservation`, `@catalog.pricing.calculate_cart_total`, and `@orders.order_repo.create_order`. Returns a pending order id.

orders.checkout.validate_checkout.name: validate_checkout
orders.checkout.validate_checkout.description: Pre-flight validation before payment. Checks that all cart items are still in stock via `@catalog.inventory.get_stock_level` and that prices haven't changed significantly via `@catalog.pricing.get_effective_price`.

orders.checkout.apply_checkout_discount.name: apply_checkout_discount
orders.checkout.apply_checkout_discount.description: Applies a last-minute discount to the checkout session. Calls `@orders.cart.apply_discount_code` and recalculates the total.

orders.checkout.confirm_checkout.name: confirm_checkout
orders.checkout.confirm_checkout.description: Finalises the order after payment capture. Calls `@orders.order_repo.update_order_status` to set status to `confirmed`, then `@orders.cart.clear_cart` and `@core.events.publish` with `order.confirmed`.

orders.checkout.fail_checkout.name: fail_checkout
orders.checkout.fail_checkout.description: Handles a failed payment during checkout. Calls `@catalog.inventory.release_reservation` to return reserved stock, then `@orders.order_repo.update_order_status` to set status to `failed`.

orders.checkout.get_checkout_summary.name: get_checkout_summary
orders.checkout.get_checkout_summary.description: Returns a summary of the pending checkout for display. Calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_id` and `@catalog.pricing.calculate_cart_total`.

orders.order_mgmt.get_order.name: get_order
orders.order_mgmt.get_order.description: Loads a full order with line items. Calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_id` and enriches with product details from `@catalog.products.get_products_by_ids`.

orders.order_mgmt.list_orders_for_user.name: list_orders_for_user
orders.order_mgmt.list_orders_for_user.description: Returns paginated orders for a user. Calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_user` with limit/offset. Enriches each order with a status label.

orders.order_mgmt.cancel_order.name: cancel_order
orders.order_mgmt.cancel_order.description: Cancels an order if it is still in a cancellable state. Calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_id` to check status, then `@orders.order_repo.update_order_status` and `@catalog.inventory.release_reservation`.

orders.order_mgmt.update_order_address.name: update_order_address
orders.order_mgmt.update_order_address.description: Updates the shipping address on an unshipped order. Calls `@orders.order_repo.update_order_status` (reuses the general update path) and `@core.events.publish` with `order.address_updated`.

orders.order_mgmt.mark_order_shipped.name: mark_order_shipped
orders.order_mgmt.mark_order_shipped.description: Marks the order as shipped and records the tracking number. Calls `@orders.order_repo.update_order_status` and publishes `order.shipped` via `@core.events.publish`. Also triggers `@core.email.send` with a shipment notification.

orders.order_mgmt.get_order_timeline.name: get_order_timeline
orders.order_mgmt.get_order_timeline.description: Returns a chronological list of status changes for an order. Calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_id` and reads the `status_history` JSON column.

orders.order_repo.create_order.name: create_order
orders.order_repo.create_order.description: Inserts a new order header and its line items in a single transaction. Calls `@core.db.execute` repeatedly within a db transaction.

orders.order_repo.find_by_id.name: find_by_id
orders.order_repo.find_by_id.description: Fetches an order header and line items by order id. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` for the header and `@core.db.fetch_many` for items.

orders.order_repo.find_by_user.name: find_by_user
orders.order_repo.find_by_user.description: Fetches all orders for a user id with pagination. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` with a user_id filter and ORDER BY created_at DESC.

orders.order_repo.update_order_status.name: update_order_status
orders.order_repo.update_order_status.description: Updates the `status` field and appends an entry to the `status_history` JSON column. Calls `@core.db.execute`.

orders.order_repo.delete_order.name: delete_order
orders.order_repo.delete_order.description: Hard-deletes an order and its line items. Only used in test teardown and admin tooling. Calls `@core.db.execute`.

orders.order_repo.find_orders_by_status.name: find_orders_by_status
orders.order_repo.find_orders_by_status.description: Fetches all orders with a given status, used for background processing queues. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` with a status filter.

payments.gateway.charge.name: charge
payments.gateway.charge.description: Initiates a payment charge for a given amount and payment method token. Calls the external payment provider API and stores the result via `@core.db.execute`. Publishes `payment.charged` via `@core.events.publish`.

payments.gateway.capture_charge.name: capture_charge
payments.gateway.capture_charge.description: Captures a previously authorised charge. Calls the provider API and updates the charge record via `@core.db.execute`.

payments.gateway.void_charge.name: void_charge
payments.gateway.void_charge.description: Voids an uncaptured authorisation. Calls the provider API and marks the charge as voided via `@core.db.execute`.

payments.gateway.get_charge_status.name: get_charge_status
payments.gateway.get_charge_status.description: Loads the stored charge record for an order. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` against the charges table.

payments.gateway.handle_webhook.name: handle_webhook
payments.gateway.handle_webhook.description: Processes inbound payment provider webhook events. Validates the signature, then routes to `@payments.gateway.capture_charge` or `@payments.gateway.void_charge` depending on event type. Publishes the result via `@core.events.publish`.

payments.gateway.list_charges_for_order.name: list_charges_for_order
payments.gateway.list_charges_for_order.description: Returns all charge attempts for a given order id. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` against the charges table.

payments.refunds.issue_refund.name: issue_refund
payments.refunds.issue_refund.description: Initiates a refund for a given charge. Calls `@payments.gateway.get_charge_status` to verify the charge is capturable, then calls the provider API and records the result via `@core.db.execute`. Publishes `payment.refunded` via `@core.events.publish`.

payments.refunds.get_refund_status.name: get_refund_status
payments.refunds.get_refund_status.description: Loads the refund record for an order. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` against the refunds table.

payments.refunds.list_refunds_for_order.name: list_refunds_for_order
payments.refunds.list_refunds_for_order.description: Returns all refund records for a given order id. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many`.

payments.refunds.partial_refund.name: partial_refund
payments.refunds.partial_refund.description: Issues a partial refund for a specific line item amount. Calls `@payments.gateway.get_charge_status` and the provider API, then records via `@core.db.execute`.

payments.refunds.void_pending_refunds.name: void_pending_refunds
payments.refunds.void_pending_refunds.description: Cancels any pending refund records when an order is hard-deleted. Calls `@core.db.execute` to update status to `voided`.

payments.invoicing.generate_invoice.name: generate_invoice
payments.invoicing.generate_invoice.description: Creates an invoice record for a completed order. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` to load the order, `@catalog.pricing.get_tax_rate` for the applicable rate, and `@core.db.execute` to insert the invoice. Also reads the billing user from `@api.auth.get_current_user` to populate the invoice header.

payments.invoicing.get_invoice.name: get_invoice
payments.invoicing.get_invoice.description: Loads an invoice by id. Calls `@core.db.fetch_one` against the invoices table.

payments.invoicing.list_invoices_for_use.name: list_invoices_for_user
payments.invoicing.list_invoices_for_use.description: Returns all invoices for a user, paginated. Calls `@core.db.fetch_many` filtered by user_id.

payments.invoicing.render_invoice_pdf.name: render_invoice_pdf
payments.invoicing.render_invoice_pdf.description: Renders an invoice to PDF using a template engine. Calls `@payments.invoicing.get_invoice` to load data, then renders and returns raw bytes.

payments.invoicing.send_invoice_email.name: send_invoice_email
payments.invoicing.send_invoice_email.description: Sends the invoice PDF to the customer by email. Calls `@payments.invoicing.render_invoice_pdf` and `@core.email.send`.

payments.invoicing.void_invoice.name: void_invoice
payments.invoicing.void_invoice.description: Marks an invoice as void. Calls `@core.db.execute` to update the status field and publishes `invoice.voided` via `@core.events.publish`.

core.db.fetch_one.name: fetch_one
core.db.fetch_one.description: Executes a SELECT query expected to return zero or one row. Manages connection acquisition from the pool and row mapping to a dict. Returns `None` on empty result.

core.db.fetch_many.name: fetch_many
core.db.fetch_many.description: Executes a SELECT query and returns all matching rows as a list of dicts. Applies limit/offset for pagination support.

core.db.execute.name: execute
core.db.execute.description: Executes an INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE statement. Returns the number of affected rows. Manages auto-commit for single-statement operations.

core.db.execute_in_transaction.name: execute_in_transaction
core.db.execute_in_transaction.description: Executes a list of SQL statements atomically within a single transaction. Rolls back on any exception and re-raises.

core.db.get_connection.name: get_connection
core.db.get_connection.description: Acquires a raw connection from the pool for advanced use cases. Callers are responsible for commit/rollback and return.

core.db.health_check.name: health_check
core.db.health_check.description: Runs a lightweight `SELECT 1` to verify database connectivity. Used by the health endpoint and startup probes.

core.cache.get.name: get
core.cache.get.description: Retrieves a value from the cache by key. Returns `None` on miss. Deserialises the stored JSON blob.

core.cache.set.name: set
core.cache.set.description: Stores a value in the cache under the given key with an optional TTL in seconds. Serialises to JSON before storage.

core.cache.delete.name: delete
core.cache.delete.description: Deletes a single cache key. No-op if the key does not exist.

core.cache.delete_pattern.name: delete_pattern
core.cache.delete_pattern.description: Deletes all keys matching a glob pattern. Used for bulk invalidation of related entries (e.g. all pricing keys for a product).

core.cache.exists.name: exists
core.cache.exists.description: Checks whether a key exists in the cache without loading its value. Returns a boolean.

core.cache.increment.name: increment
core.cache.increment.description: Atomically increments an integer counter stored at a key. Used for rate limiting and usage tracking.

core.cache.flush_namespace.name: flush_namespace
core.cache.flush_namespace.description: Deletes all keys under a given namespace prefix. Used during integration test teardown.

core.email.send.name: send
core.email.send.description: Sends a transactional email. Accepts `to`, `subject`, `html_body`, and optional `attachments`. Queues the message via the configured provider SDK.

core.email.send_bulk.name: send_bulk
core.email.send_bulk.description: Sends the same email to multiple recipients. Batches calls to `@core.email.send` respecting provider rate limits.

core.email.render_template.name: render_template
core.email.render_template.description: Renders an email HTML body from a named Jinja2 template and a context dict. Returns the rendered string for use with `@core.email.send`.

core.email.validate_address.name: validate_address
core.email.validate_address.description: Validates an email address format and optionally checks the domain's MX record. Returns a boolean.

core.events.publish.name: publish
core.events.publish.description: Publishes a domain event to the event bus. Accepts an event name and a payload dict. Serialises to JSON and writes to the configured broker topic. Also calls `@orders.order_repo.find_by_id` to enrich order-related events with order metadata before publishing.

core.events.subscribe.name: subscribe
core.events.subscribe.description: Registers a handler function for a given event pattern. Used at application startup to wire up async consumers.

core.events.get_event_history.name: get_event_history
core.events.get_event_history.description: Returns recent published events for a given topic, loaded from `@core.db.fetch_many` against the events log table.

core.events.replay_events.name: replay_events
core.events.replay_events.description: Replays events from the log for a given topic and time range. Calls `@core.events.get_event_history` and re-publishes each via `@core.events.publish`.
